title: Paypaxe Web
shortDescription: Personal finance management and automated payroll platform for individuals and SMEs in Africa.
whatWasDone: Designed and developed a full-stack fintech platform enabling individuals and SMEs to manage payroll, savings, and investments in a unified ecosystem.
Built the frontend application using React and TypeScript, creating responsive dashboards and financial management interfaces for users, freelancers and businesses.
Engineered a payroll processing engine for Nigerian SMEs to automate salary payments, PAYE tax computation, and statutory deductions.
Implemented secure digital wallet infrastructure for user balances, transfers, and transaction tracking.
Developed an 'Esusu/Ajo' cooperative savings module that digitizes traditional group savings systems.
Architected backend APIs and cloud infrastructure to support scalable and secure financial operations.

title: Paypaxe Mobile
shortDescription: Cross-platform fintech application for seamless personal finance and payroll management.
whatWasDone: Developed a cross-platform fintech mobile application using React Native and TypeScript for iOS and Android.
Built responsive financial dashboards and transaction interfaces enabling users to manage wallet balances, savings, and budgets directly from mobile.
Optimized the app for low-bandwidth and unstable network environments common in emerging markets.
Implemented biometric authentication and secure session handling to protect sensitive financial data.
Integrated real-time push notifications to keep users updated on financial events.
Managed global state and financial data flows using Redux Toolkit for predictable and scalable state management.
Released the application to production on the Google Play Store, achieving 100+ downloads.

title: NoteIQ Web
shortDescription: Transform your notes into interactive learning experiences. Study less, understand more.
whatWasDone: Founded and built an AI-powered platform that turns messy notes, documents, images, and recordings into clean, structured study materials.
Integrated OpenAI LLMs to automatically generate summaries, quizzes, and flashcards so users can study faster and retain more.
Built a fast and responsive web interface with React and Vite, focusing on creating an intuitive and efficient study experience.
Developed backend workflows to process user uploads and transform them into interactive learning content.
Integrated Paystack to enable credit based payments for advanced AI-powered study features.

title: NoteIQ Mobile
shortDescription: React Native-powered learning companion for hands-free study and mobile notes.
whatWasDone: Brought NoteIQ’s AI-powered study tools to mobile using React Native and Expo, creating a seamless, on-the-go learning experience.
Built a low-latency transcription interface so users can turn lectures and voice notes into searchable study material instantly.
Implemented on-device study reminders and progress tracking to keep users engaged wherever they are.
Managed complex global state with Redux Toolkit, keeping study data perfectly in sync across web and mobile platforms.
Optimized the mobile UI for accessibility and distraction-free study sessions, making learning smoother and more enjoyable.

title: Nova Agent
shortDescription: High-performance local reasoning engine with OODA loop self-correction, parallel execution, and autonomous task management.
whatWasDone: Built a high-performance autonomous agent that executes multi-step workflows locally with minimal supervision.
Integrated a continuous OODA (Observe, Orient, Decide, Act) loop for real-time self-correction and adaptive decision-making.
Implemented parallel task execution using Node.js workers and Piscina, enabling simultaneous browsing, scripting, and API calls.
Designed a Markdown-first persistent memory system to store long-term tasks, goals, and context securely.
Enabled proactive automation with Telegram notifications, recurring tasks, and Google Workspace integrations.
Packaged the agent as an NPM module with CLI and WebSocket support for developer adoption and custom frontends.

title: OpenLaw
shortDescription: The first AI assistant dedicated strictly to the Nigerian Constitution with verified citations.
whatWasDone: Pioneered a specialized AI legal assistant utilizing a custom RAG pipeline for the Nigerian Constitution.
Scientifically indexed 320+ constitutional sections to provide exact, verified citations for every query.
Integrated YarnGPT for localized voice synthesis, making legal information accessible via native Nigerian voices.
Built a secure, high-fidelity chat experience with a focus on informational accuracy and platform trust.

title: MovieVerse
shortDescription: Semantic movie discovery engine using Groq and Llama 3.3 for thematic search.
whatWasDone: Redefined entertainment discovery by replacing keyword filters with a powerful AI semantic search engine.
Leveraged Groq and Llama 3.3 to interpret complex natural language queries about film themes and mood.
Engineered a custom re-ranking algorithm combining TMDB metadata with AI thematic vectors.
Delivered a fluid Next.js interface for real-time cinematic exploration and discovery.

title: Luckywho
shortDescription: Transparent and fair Nigerian raffling platform for digital competitions.
whatWasDone: Architected the high-availability backend for a transparent digital raffle and competition platform.
Developed the NGOZI SEQUENCE to provide verifiable digital randomness and 100% auditability for draws.
Built a secure wallet system and ticketing engine capable of handling high-velocity concurrent transactions.
Maintained strict ledger integrity for all financial movements and prize disbursements.

title: Always Secure
shortDescription: Zero-knowledge password vault with client-side AES-256 encryption and burn-on-read.
whatWasDone: Developed a 'Trust No One' security vault ensuring private data is encrypted before leaving the client.
Leveraged the Web Crypto API to implement high-grade end-to-end AES-256 encryption flows.
Engineered a unique 'burn-on-read' persistence layer using Upstash Redis for temporary shared secrets.
Designed an anonymous UI focus that prioritizes user privacy and data minimization.
